hero.badge: Built for cleaning, facilities & property teams
hero.subtitle: Shift control by building. Supervisor inbox. Absence reports. Community portal. Live communication from HQ to supervisors to operatives — all in one place.
hero.trust: 14-day free trial · No credit card · From £49/month

logos: Trusted by operations teams across 14 countries

features.title: Everything your operations team needs.
features.subtitle: Built specifically for cleaning companies, facilities management and property managers — not generic SaaS retrofitted to fit.
features.shift_desc: Assign operatives to sites and shifts (day / night). See who's on, who's missing, who's covering — at a glance.
features.inbox_desc: Every task lands in one inbox. Supervisors confirm completion, request cover, escalate incidents — without ten WhatsApp groups.
features.absence_desc: Operatives request time off, supervisors approve, HQ sees coverage gaps before they hurt the SLA.
features.community_desc: WeWork-style hub for your operatives. Announcements, schedules, payslips, team directory — your brand, your rules.
features.comms_desc: Direct chat across the three levels. Broadcast to a building, a team, or one operative. Auto-translate optional.
features.geo_desc: Operative confirms arrival at the right building. No more "I was there, I swear" — GPS-verified timesheet.
features.photo_desc: Cleaner uploads photo when the job is done. HQ and property managers see proof on every shift.
features.airbnb_desc: Connect your Airbnb / Booking.com calendar. Tasks auto-create on every checkout — no manual scheduling.

segments.title: From 5 cleaners to 5,000 operatives.
segments.subtitle: Three tiers — same platform. Start small, scale to enterprise without changing tools.
airbnb_props: Who goes to which flat today — auto-assigned
Photo evidence proves the clean was done
iCal sync: tasks auto-create on Airbnb checkout
Per-property rating from the property manager
segments.midmarket_customers: FM contractors, office cleaners, schools, clinics
midmarket_props: Supervisor dashboard ready out of the box
segments.enterprise_customers: FM companies, hospitals, airports, hotel chains, WeWork-style operators
enterprise_props: White-label with your logo and colours
Custom community portal for your operatives
API or integration with your ERP / payroll

portals.title: Built for every layer of operations.
portals.subtitle: Four purpose-built portals, one shared source of truth — from C-suite dashboards to frontline mobile apps.
portals.hq_desc: Global operations overview, multi-site analytics, role permissions, billing.
portals.manager_desc: Team management, staff performance, task assignment, incident oversight.
portals.supervisor_desc: Live supervision, audits, site inspections, real-time task tracking.
portals.operative_desc: Mobile-first PWA. Clock-in, tasks, incident reports, photo evidence.

dashboard.title: Real-time visibility across every site.
dashboard.body: Know what's happening — right now. Live shift status, audit scores, incident feeds, and SLA performance across your entire operation, updated the moment it changes on the ground.
dashboard.bullet_metrics: Performance metrics rolled up across portfolios
dashboard.bullet_stream: Live activity stream — every action audited

integrations.title: Plays nicely with your stack.
integrations.subtitle: SSO, webhooks, REST API and native integrations — connect Portal Services Digital to the tools your team already uses.

security.title: Enterprise security, by default.
security.subtitle: Designed from the ground up for organisations that take data, compliance and uptime seriously.
security.rbac_sub: Granular roles, SAML, OAuth, MFA enforced
security.uptime_sub: Multi-region, encrypted at rest and in transit

pricing.title: Pricing that fits your team size.
pricing.subtitle: Pay monthly. Cancel anytime. 14-day free trial — no credit card required.
pricing.footnote: All prices in GBP. Volume discounts for 100+ operatives. VAT not included.
pricing.airbnb_description: For Airbnb hosts, co-hosts and small property managers.
pricing.midmarket_description: For cleaning companies, FM contractors, schools and clinics.
pricing.enterprise_description: For FM groups, hospitals, airports and hotel chains.
enterprise_features: White-label with your logo and colours

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your operations?
cta.subtitle: Join the operations teams running their entire field workforce on Portal Services Digital.

contact.title: Tell us about your operation
contact.subtitle: Drop your details and we'll reach out on WhatsApp within the day.
contact.field_message_placeholder: How many cleaners, what segment, anything else we should know…
contact.privacy: We use your details only to follow up about Portal Services. No spam, no third parties.
contact.success_body: We'll reach out shortly. Keep an eye on your WhatsApp and inbox.
contact.err_email: That email doesn't look right. Mind checking it?
contact.err_generic: Something went wrong on our side. Try again or email us directly.

lead_autoreply.body: Thanks for reaching out about Portal Services — we got your message and someone from the team will be in touch within 24 hours.
